items.name: DynamicLake
items.tagline: Dynamic Island experience for Mac with apps & notifications
items.description: DynamicLake - Dynamic Island for Mac · Notificaitons · Drag and drop · Converter · Calls · Airdrop · Timer · and more

items.name: Google Workspace CLI
items.tagline: CLI for Google Workspace ecosystem built for humans & agents
items.description: Google Workspace CLI lets humans and AI agents control Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, and more from one CLI. Built from Google’s Discovery Service, it stays up to date automatically and includes 100+ agent skills to automate workflows without the MCP context tax.

items.name: ClawSecure
items.tagline: The only complete security platform for OpenClaw AI agents
items.description: ClawSecure is CrowdStrike for OpenClaw AI agents. 3-layer security audit, real-time Watchtower monitoring, agent marketplace and identity security, and full 10/10 OWASP ASI coverage. 41% of top skills are dangerous. 1 in 5 are sending your data to attackers. Secure your agents in 30 seconds for free. clawsecure.ai

items.name: ElevenCreative by ElevenLabs
items.tagline: The AI creative platform to bring your content to life
items.description: ElevenCreative is a single platform to generate, edit, and localize premium audio and video in minutes, powered by advanced voice, music, SFX, image, and video models. Powering millions of creators, marketing teams, and media companies worldwide.

items.name: Cal.com Agents
items.tagline: AI Agents coming to the best scheduling tool
items.description: Install Cal.com scheduling agents in Slack, Telegram, OpenClaw, or build your own with the Cal.com API. AI-powered scheduling for humans and agents alike.

items.name: Motion Software
items.tagline: Modern screen recordings for Windows, made simple.
items.description: Motion processes your recording and creates a beautiful video that stands out. Capture your video, configure the animation as you like, and let Motion handle the animations.

items.name: The Banana App
items.tagline: Speak human - Where every word finds its way home
items.description: Real-time voice translation calling that preserves YOUR voice. First minute free on every call, then just 10¢/min. 80+ languages. No subscriptions, no expiring credits. Your personality and tone come through - not a robotic translation. Simple pricing, human connection.

items.name: ByteRover Memory System for OpenClaw
items.tagline: File-based memory for OpenClaw with >92% retrieval accuracy
items.description: Give OpenClaw agents stateful memory that keep your context's timeline, facts, and meaning perfectly in place. ByteRover is a memory layer that gets 26k+ downloads from OpenClaw power users within one week, and delivers a market-best 92.19% retrieval accuracy, local-to-cloud portability, and built-in version control.

items.name: Morgen
items.tagline: Your entire morning in one tab.
items.description: Every morning you open 12 tabs, check the weather on your phone, wonder what time it is in Tokyo, forget which subscription renews today, and lose 50 minutes before your day even starts. Morgen replaces all of that with a single page. It's a local-first morning dashboard: weather, links, world clocks, site monitors, subscriptions, moon phase. It runs entirely on your machine. No account. No cloud. No tracking. You open it, you do your morning check-in, you close it.

items.name: LaterAI
items.description: LaterAI turns saved articles into a personal reading experience powered entirely by on-device AI. No sign-ups. No cloud. No data leaving your phone. Save from any app with one tap. Listen with built-in TTS engines offline. Get AI summaries, daily digests with quizzes and hot takes, and personalized recommendations, all running on-device. Explore 150+ curated sources, track reading streaks, and highlight what matters. No account. No tracking. Your reading habits are nobody's business but yours.

sample_reviews.text: What’s the point of letting me select what things I want to get rid of if I have to pay for it to actually delete it

This company is running malicious pop up ads where if you install the app from their tracking link, it switches to being a rogue antivirus. It says your iPhone has 5 “generic trojans” and that you need to pay $12.99 per week to fix it. Genuinely despicable.

I paid for the year believing that this app would clean up my tablet and help it run smoother so to speak. It claims that it will help improve the battery life as well as clean up the pictures and it’s done nothing. 
Please return my money.

Stole money from me
Have to wait for apple to sort that out now
Strange how this App is the one that you are directed to by a virus scam.
